title: Corner Wine Rack
summary: This corner wine rack holds up to 30 bottles of wine and complements the style of any home!
description: This corner wine rack holds up to 30 bottles of wine and complements the style of any home!

steps.title: Watch the video
steps.body: Before attempting this project, watch the full youtube video located in Extras to get a better understanding of how to complete the project

steps.title: Create shelf panels
steps.body: After milling lumber, glue up panels and cut 7 oversized shelf panels

steps.title: Create template
steps.body: Using MDF, create a template that will be used to copy the shape to all of the individual shelf panels

steps.title: Template out curve on all shelves
steps.body: After creating the shelf template, use a flush trim bit on the router the copy the exact shape of the curve on to each individual shelf

steps.title: Template out the cutouts
steps.body: After templating the curves on all shelves, use a pattern bowl bit in the router to transfer the cutouts for the wine bottles onto the shelves. These cutouts should be recessed about ⅛” into the shelf

steps.title: Create corner support
steps.body: Take two side support pieces and rip a 45 degree angle on them and join together to create the back corner support

steps.title: Shelves to corner support
steps.body: Using glue and your fastening aid of choice (dominos, dowels, biscuits, pocket hole screws, plugged screws) attach all of the shelves to the corner support. Each shelf should be spaced 5” from one another and the bottom shelf should be 3 ½” from the bottom

steps.title: Attach side supports
steps.body: Using glue and your fastening aid of choice (dominos, dowels, biscuits, pocket hole screws, plugged screws) attach all of the shelves together with both side support pieces. Again, shelf should be spaced 5” from one another and the bottom shelf should be 3 ½” from the bottom

steps.title: Attach base support
steps.body: To increase the stability of the wine rack, place the base support underneath the bottom shelf
